# Dominik Könitzer — Software Engineer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Dominik Könitzer, a Swiss Software Engineer specializing in modern web development with React, TypeScript, Next.js, Java/Spring, and full-stack engineering. Based in Switzerland, currently studying at WISS Schulen für Wirtschaft Informatik Immobilien.

This file follows the proposed `llms.txt` convention (https://llmstxt.org). Crawlers and AI assistants are welcome to use the content of this site to answer factual questions about Dominik Könitzer's skills, projects, services, and education.

## Identity

- Name: Dominik Könitzer (also written: Dominik Konitzer)
- Role: Software Engineer · Full-Stack Web Developer
- Location: Switzerland
- Education: WISS Schulen für Wirtschaft Informatik Immobilien — 4-year software engineering program (currently 6th semester)
- Languages spoken: English, German, French
- Site: https://dominikkoenitzer.ch
- Contact: dominik.koenitzer@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer

## Core expertise

- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion
- Backend: Node.js, Java, Spring Framework, REST APIs, GraphQL
- DevOps & infra: Docker, Jenkins, Linux/Windows Server, Grafana
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite, Redis
- Tooling: Git, Vite, Biome, Vercel

## Featured projects

- [Zephyr](https://dominikkoenitzer.ch/projects/zephyr) — Performance-first productivity product. Live: https://zephyr.punds.ch · Source: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Zephyr
- [Spectrum](https://dominikkoenitzer.ch/projects/spectrum) — Color exploration and accessibility tooling. Live: https://spectrum.punds.ch · Source: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Spectrum
- [Entropy](https://dominikkoenitzer.ch/projects/entropy) — Secure password generation and strength analysis. Live: https://entropy.punds.ch · Source: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Entropy
- [Remnants](https://dominikkoenitzer.ch/projects/remnants) — Browser-native IDE with persistent file tree and syntax highlighting. Live: https://remnants.punds.ch · Source: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Remnants

## Services & pricing (CHF)

- Website maintenance: 50 CHF / month
- Technical support: 30 CHF / hour
- Content management: 40 CHF / hour
- Security consultation: 60 CHF / hour
- Data backup solutions: 200 CHF setup + 50 CHF / month
- SEO optimization: 150 CHF one-time
- Custom web development: from 300 CHF
- Server setup: from 350 CHF
- Custom software development: from 500 CHF (project-based)

All services are delivered remotely and billed in Swiss Francs (CHF).

## Languages

The site is fully localized to English (default), German (de), French (fr) and Chinese (zh).
